# CrowNest public clients

Official open-source clients for CrowNest cloud sandboxes.

## Start here

- Agent instructions: AGENTS.md
- Examples: examples/README.md
- Change log: CHANGELOG.md
- API catalog: https://api.crownest.dev/.well-known/api-catalog
- OpenAPI: https://api.crownest.dev/openapi.json
- auth.md: https://api.crownest.dev/auth.md
- Docs: https://docs.crownest.dev/docs

## Packages

- TypeScript SDK: packages/sdk/README.md
- Python SDK: packages/python-sdk/README.md
- CLI: packages/cli/README.md
- MCP server: packages/mcp/README.md
- Public contracts: packages/contracts/README.md
- Vercel AI SDK tools: packages/ai-sdk/README.md

## Evals

- Agent-use ratchet: evals/agent-use/README.md
- Verify everything: pnpm verify
